title: Chump ambient.jsonl event schema
description: Schema for every line written to .chump-locks/ambient.jsonl. Validated at emit time by scripts/dev/ambient-emit.sh (INFRA-101). The 2026-04-26 audit found INTENT rows had reordered keys + a nonstandard shape — this schema is the canonical contract going forward. The five base fields (ts, session, worktree, harness, event) are required for every event; per-event-kind extensions are listed below in oneOf.

ts.description: UTC timestamp in ISO 8601 with trailing Z. Produced by `date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ`.

session.description: Session ID. Resolution priority: $CHUMP_SESSION_ID, $CLAUDE_SESSION_ID, .chump-locks/.wt-session-id cache, or a derived chump-<worktree>-<unix> default.

worktree.description: Basename of the writing worktree. Same as $(basename $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)) for the writer.

harness.description: Agent harness identity (CREDIBLE-037). Set via CHUMP_AGENT_HARNESS env var or --harness flag. Values: opencode / opencode-bigpickle / fleet-dispatcher / claude-code-ide / manual / unknown.

event.description: One of the well-known event kinds. Adding a new kind requires a new entry here AND a new branch in the oneOf below.

kind.description: INFRA-1159: canonical discriminator field; dual-written alongside 'event' by ambient-emit.sh

oneOf.title: INTENT
oneOf.description: Pre-INFRA-101 INTENT writers used a different key order; this schema accepts that legacy shape but requires the same base fields.

kind.description: INFRA-1159: specific event kind; must not be generic ALERT or INFO sentinel

oneOf.title: gen_smoke_results
oneOf.description: Emitted by scripts/qa/test-chump-gen-fixtures.sh (INFRA-594) after running the 10-fixture chump-gen smoke suite.

oneOf.title: fleet_queue_depth
oneOf.description: Emitted every 60s by control.sh (INFRA-558). pickable_count matches the active fleet filter set; p0_count and oldest_p0_age_days are fleet-wide P0 stats regardless of filter.
